title: Add Sprout to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Sprout](https://murderszn.github.io/sprout/) to build
- Display the Sprout social card image at https://murderszn.github.io/sprout/public/og-image.png.

Fixes #12217

gist.headline: A new Sprout in the garden
gist.blurb: A brand new app called Sprout just took root in our community Greenhouse. We love seeing what you all build with our tools!
gist.summary: Added the community-built app Sprout to the Pollinations Greenhouse and apps directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore the Sprout app alongside other community creations in the official directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about adding an app called 'Sprout' to the 'Greenhouse'. The visual should be literal: Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse, watering or looking at a tiny new sprout (plant) in a pot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, carefully watering a glowing new green sprout in a terracotta pot inside a glass greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
